Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class UserAccessPolicyFilter

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.UserAccessPolicyFilter
public class UserAccessPolicyFilter extends Object

Java class for UserAccessPolicyFilter complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="UserAccessPolicyFilter">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="columnName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="operation" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}UserAccessPolicyFilterOperation"/>
         <element name="sortOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="target" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="type" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}UserAccessPolicyFilterTargetType"/>
         <element name="value" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
